name: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final Watch Party Live in Central Park
description: Global Citizen in partnership with FIFA are presenting Live On the Lawn. A FIFA Finals Match viewing party. All tickets are General Admission and standing only. Must adhere to entry and Ground Rules on Ticket/Global Citizen Website. No Re-entry. Event is Rain/Shine. Event Concludes at the end of the match. Re-sale of Free/Donated/Promotional tickets is strictly prohibited by Global and by NYS. Tickets are subject to void if found to be posted for unlawful sale. Please add your tickets to your digital wallet before entering the Park. Do not rely on cellphone reception in the park. Tickets won via Draw, winning code not enough to enter, need Ticketmaster Ticket. Gates open at 12pm. Gates are subject to close at anytime, please arrive early before the match and anticipate security line delays to enter.
